scripts.dev: npm -w @phoi/frontend run build && tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.sea: node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync(process.execPath, 'phcode.exe')" && npx postject phcode.exe NODE_SEA_BLOB sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
